commits: 275da40a: feat(ux): implement Phase 1 foundation for UX refresh (#600)
message: Phase 1 TDD implementation complete. 8 tasks implemented: review-config constants, DeepLinkPane type, getNextAction/getReviewStatus helpers, stalled-detector, useLayoutConfig, useSendMessage, useWorktreeList, useWorktreesCache, isDeepLinkPane validator. 80 new tests all passing. 0 ESLint errors, 0 TypeScript errors.
